_notes: Only tables[], secretObjects[], and secrets[] are active migration inputs.
tableInventory and notMigratedSecrets are documentation so source names stay visible without being copied.

tableInventory.notes: Default migration table. Shopify app sessions use id PK and shop-index GSI on shop.
Default migration table. POS feature/config flags.
Default migration table. Preserve active ttl values.
Not copied as a separate table. Add Signup Customer now uses the unified retail POS app session table.
Not copied as a separate table. Alo Access now uses the unified retail POS app session table.

notMigratedSecrets.reason: New extension deploys use GitHub Actions secrets instead of migrating the legacy CLI token.
Not referenced by the checked alo-pos-apps runtime path; include only if a separate rewards flow is confirmed in scope.
Not referenced by the checked alo-pos-apps runtime path; include only if a separate rewards flow is confirmed in scope.

secretObjects.meaning: Shopify app credential pair. Legacy SHOPIFY_API_KEY is clientId and legacy SHOPIFY_API_SECRET is clientSecret. New runtime env names are SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID and SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET.

manualFields.name: apiKey
manualFields.meaning: Optional Shopify Admin API key/token used by inventory lookup and hydrated as SHOPIFY_API_KEY; populate manually if the source is not confirmed.

secretObjects.meaning: Alo API credential pair used by signup/customer helper flows. New runtime env names are ALO_API_KEY and ALO_API_SECRET_KEY.
LoyaltyLion credential pair. Existing app env vars remain LOYALTYLION_API_TOKEN and LOYALTYLION_API_SECRET.
Store fulfillment credential pair. Existing app env vars remain STOREFULFILLMENT_API_KEY and STOREFULFILLMENT_API_SECRET_KEY.
